articles.title: ‘Blatant discrimination’: WNBA’s decision to punish Caitlin Clark sparks outrage - Yahoo Sports
articles.description: Indiana Fever point guard Caitlin Clark will not have her technical foul from Monday night's game rescinded.
articles.content: The Indiana Fever’s Monday night win over the Phoenix Mercury got chippy in the fourth quarter, with Fever star Caitlin Clark and Mercury veteran DeWana Bonner getting into an altercation that led to… [+2789 chars]
